case_title: COREY, AMY vs. RUFFINO,PAUL IND&DBA THE GOURMET SOCIETY,GRAL PART et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUFFINO,PAUL IND&DBA THE GOURMET SOCIETY,GRAL PART RUFFINO,SUSAN IND&DBA THE GOURMET SOCIETY GRAL PAR $7,399.20 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,482.20

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF COREY, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT RUFFINO,PAUL IND&DBA THE GOURMET SOCIETY,GRAL PART RUFFINO,SUSAN IND&DBA THE GOURMET SOCIETY GRAL PAR
PLEADINGS CAME TO US FOR FILE ON 4-25-96.
